About Me

Complete Game Development Pipeline

Creating game-ready 3D assets and full Unity projects. Expert in Blender modeling, PBR texturing, Unity C# programming, and optimization for all platforms.

Specializing in stylized game assets, environments, characters, weapons, and complete gameplay systems. Fast turnaround for indie devs and studios.
